mapper.select: select customer_id, menu_id, ifnull(status,'0') as status, ifnull(is_enabled,'1') as is_enabled, create_by, create_time, delete_by, delete_time from sb_customer_menu where customer_id = #{customerId} and delete_time is null
select menu_id from sb_customer_menu where customer_id = #{customerId} and delete_time is null and ifnull(is_enabled,'1') = '1'

select cm.customer_id as customerId, cm.menu_id as menuId, m.menu_name as menuName, ifnull(cm.status,'0') as status from sb_customer_menu cm inner join sb_menu m on m.menu_id = cm.menu_id and m.menu_type in ('M','C','F') where cm.customer_id = #{customerId} and cm.delete_time is null and ifnull(cm.is_enabled,'1') = '1' order by m.parent_id, m.order_num
mapper.update: update sb_customer_menu set is_enabled = #{isEnabled} where customer_id = #{customerId} and menu_id = #{menuId} and delete_time is null
mapper.insert: insert into sb_customer_menu (customer_id, menu_id, status, is_enabled, create_by, create_time) values (#{customerId}, #{menuId}, ifnull(#{status},'0'), ifnull(#{isEnabled},'1'), #{createBy}, sysdate())

insert into sb_customer_menu (customer_id, menu_id, status, is_enabled, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.customerId}, #{item.menuId}, ifnull(#{item.status},'0'), ifnull(#{item.isEnabled},'1'), #{item.createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update sb_customer_menu set status = #{status} where customer_id = #{customerId} and menu_id = #{menuId} and delete_time is null
mapper.select: select count(1) from sb_customer_menu where customer_id = #{customerId} and menu_id = #{menuId} and delete_time is null
